arts.ttl: Juventus join Atlético Madrid in hunt for Barcelona star
arts.sum: A new suitor have positioned themselves in the running for the signing of a member of the loan army at La Liga giants Barcelona. That’s according to Mundo Deportivo, who…

arts.ttl: Barcelona make contact for Fiorentina’s Dodo
arts.sum: Fiorentina have been really impressive in Serie A this season and their right back Dodo has been nothing short of a revelation. He has already provided 4 assists this season…

arts.ttl: Ex-Barcelona star Neymar names his favourites to win the Champions League
arts.sum: Former Barcelona star Neymar Jr. has this week provided his take on the favourites to go all the way in this season’s edition of the Champions League. And his response…

arts.ttl: Bundesliga Player of the Month nominees: Amiri, Olise, Simons among six candidates
arts.sum: Vote for Bundesliga Player of March 2025: Nadiem Amiri, Michael Olise, and others. Amiri shines with 2 goals, 2 assists; Olise tops assists, chances created; Simons scores twice for Leipzig.

arts.ttl: Official: Barcelona name squad to face Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: The group of players set to be depended upon by the coaching staff at Barcelona to get the better of Borussia Dortmund on Wednesday has been unveiled online. Barcelona are…

arts.ttl: Six candidates for Bundesliga Player of the Month award for March revealed
arts.sum: Players from Mainz, FC Bayern, RB Leipzig, Borussia Dortmund, Borussia Mönchengladbach and Bayer Leverkusen are in the running for the Bundesliga Player of the Month award for March.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star claims Pep Guardiola flew to Spain to broker Man City transfer deal
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola tried to raid former club Barcelona in 2016 during his first summer as Manchester City boss but his advances failed to bear fruit

arts.ttl: La Liga remove statement on Barcelona salary limit after demand
arts.sum: Barcelona did as President Joan Laporta promised on Monday, firing back at La Liga’s statement that they had reduced the club’s salary limit after the lease of 475 VIP seats at Camp Nou, and the €100m income from it, had been removed from their accounts. They accused La Liga have breaching their right to confidentiality. […] The post La Liga remove statement on Barcelona salary limit after demand appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Ter Stegen admits he ‘didn’t always get along’ with Messi
arts.sum: “I think Leo is probably the only player who, if he wants to shoot you in the face, can do it. Marc-Andre ter Stegen has admitted he didn’t always get along with Lionel Messi at Barcelona but has stressed how much he respects the GOAT.

arts.ttl: Barcelona Director of Football Deco contacts agent of 26-year-old Serie A full-back
arts.sum: Barcelona Director of Football Deco may not have certianty on what he will have to spend in the summer, but he is continuing his search for defensive reinforcements next season. With several right-backs linked to the club in recent months, a new name appears to be on their radar.
